import asyncio
from app.database.turso_client import TursoClient

async def main\(\):
    db = TursoClient\(\)
    await db.connect\(\)
    result = await db.execute\(\\"SELECT id, email, name, subscription_status, subscription_plan, is_active, grace_period_until, created_at FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Palomares%' OR name LIKE '%Ramon%'\\", []\)
    if result.rows:
        for r in result.rows:
            print\(dict\(r\)\)
    else:
        print\('No encontrado por nombre, buscando todos los recientes...'\)
        result2 = await db.execute\(\\"SELECT id, email, name, subscription_status, subscription_plan, is_active, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5\\", []\)
        for r in result2.rows:
            print\(dict\(r\)\)
    await db.disconnect\(\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio
from app.database.turso_client import TursoClient

async def main\(\):
    db = TursoClient\(\)
    await db.connect\(\)
    result = await db.execute\('SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\\"table\\" AND name=\\"users\\"', []\)
    for r in result.rows:
        print\(r\)
    await db.disconnect\(\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
